data.body:
Yeah. The ADC -> bad digital processing -> DAC chain is infuriating, given the tubes were otherwise high quality. 

Some have a VGA port that skips the processing. Those are worth a look so long as you're able to feed them the appropriate signal. Many more options on that front vs. back in the day.
